name: France
welcome: Bonjour! Welcome to France — the land of the Eiffel Tower, croissants, and art!
summary: France is a beautiful country in the heart of western Europe.
It is famous for fashion, delicious food, and breathtaking art.
Its capital city, Paris, is known as the City of Light!

LOCATION.intro: Let's find France on our map!

items.title: France in Europe
narration: France is in western Europe, shaped a bit like a hexagon.
It borders eight countries including Spain, Italy, and Germany.
France also has beautiful coastlines on the Atlantic Ocean and the Mediterranean Sea.

LANDMARKS.intro: France has some of the most famous landmarks in the world!

items.title: Eiffel Tower
narration: The Eiffel Tower is the most visited monument in the world!
It was built in 1889 and stands 330 metres tall.
Every night it sparkles with thousands of lights — like magic!

items.title: The Louvre Museum
narration: The Louvre is the biggest art museum in the world!
Inside lives the most famous painting ever — the Mona Lisa.
You could spend a whole week there and still not see everything!

items.title: Mont Saint-Michel
narration: Mont Saint-Michel is a magical island with a medieval castle on top!
At high tide, the sea surrounds it completely — like a fairy-tale island.
Monks have lived there for over a thousand years.

FOOD.intro: French food is loved all around the world!

items.title: Croissant
narration: A croissant is a light, flaky, buttery pastry shaped like a crescent moon.
French people eat them warm for breakfast with coffee or hot chocolate.
Making a perfect croissant takes many hours of folding the dough just right.

items.title: Crêpes
narration: Crêpes are very thin, delicate pancakes from France!
You can fill them with chocolate spread, strawberries, or lemon and sugar.
Street crêpe stalls in Paris smell absolutely delicious!

CITIES.intro: France has stunning cities full of history and culture!

items.title: Paris
narration: Paris is the capital of France and one of the most beautiful cities on Earth!
The Seine River flows right through the middle of the city.
Paris has thousands of cafes, art galleries, and gorgeous old buildings.

LANGUAGE.intro: In France, people speak French. Let's learn some words!

items.title: Bonjour — Hello
narration: Bonjour means hello in French!
Say it with me — bon-ZHOOR!
French is spoken in over 29 countries around the world.

items.title: Merci — Thank You
narration: Merci means thank you in French!
Say it with me — mair-SEE!
French people love to greet each other with a kiss on each cheek.

FUN_FACTS.intro: Here are some fun facts about France!

items.title: Most Visited Country
narration: France is the most visited country in the whole world!
More than 90 million tourists visit every year.
That is more tourists than France even has people living in it!

items.title: Cheese Paradise
narration: France makes over 1,000 different types of cheese!
Famous French cheeses include Brie, Camembert, and Roquefort.
French people eat cheese at almost every meal.
